task_completion.description: Restore natural paragraph flow by joining broken lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text paragraphs should flow naturally to the right margin of the document without arbitrary early line breaks. The text should look like normal block paragraphs, not a narrow column of broken lines.

Words that were previously split by hyphens across lines (e.g., 'declaration', 'fundamental', 'jurisdictional', 'distinction', 'inalienable', 'conscience', 'brotherhood') should be rejoined into single words without hyphens.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Title' style to the first line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first line 'Universal Declaration of Human Rights' should be visually distinct as a Title (typically the largest font, often centered) or the style dropdown/sidebar should show 'Title' when the cursor is on it.
The word 'Preamble' should be formatted as Heading 1 (larger and bolder than normal text) or the style dropdown/sidebar should show 'Heading 1' when selected.
The text 'Article 1' through 'Article 5' should be formatted as Heading 2 (distinct from normal text and Heading 1) or the style dropdown/sidebar should show 'Heading 2' when selected.
The window title bar of the word processor should display 'udhr_restored.docx', or a 'Save As' dialog should be visible saving the file to the specified path.

integrity.description: The agent used a word processor GUI to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a word processor application (like LibreOffice Writer) open and being interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent performed the edits using the GUI rather than terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen manually editing the text, using the GUI's find-and-replace feature, or applying styles via the interface, rather than running a script in the terminal to generate the final document.

integrity.description: The document contains the actual UDHR text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the document should be the authentic Universal Declaration of Human Rights, not placeholder or dummy text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source document contains the Universal Declaration of Human Rights (Preamble and Articles 1-5). The original text has hard line breaks at ~55 characters and split hyphenated words (e.g., 'declaration', 'fundamental', 'jurisdictional', 'distinction', 'inalienable', 'conscience', 'brotherhood'). The cleaned document should have 10-25 paragraphs. The first line 'Universal Declaration of Human Rights' must be 'Title' style. 'Preamble' must be 'Heading 1'. 'Article 1' through 'Article 5' must be 'Heading 2'.
